title: GitHub Review by greptile-apps[bot]
summary: The reviewer wants two empty-string validation guards added in `plugins.go`: (1) reject `MiddlewareSpec` entries with an empty `Name` to prevent malformed PasteDeploy pipeline directives and filter sections, and (2) reject plugins with an empty `ConfigSection` to prevent invalid INI section names. Both cases currently pass existing guards and produce invalid output at runtime.

code_comments.author: greptile-apps[bot]
code_comments.resolution: Added an early guard `if mw.Name == "" { return nil, fmt.Errorf(...) }` at the top of the middleware iteration loop in `RenderPastePipeline`, exactly as suggested. A new test `TestRenderPastePipeline_emptyMiddlewareNameReturnsError` verifies this path.

code_comments.body:
**Empty `ConfigSection` produces invalid INI output**

The function guards against duplicate `ConfigSection` names but not against an empty one. If `p.ConfigSection == ""`, the result map gets an entry with key `""`. When passed to `config.RenderINI`, this renders as `[]` — an invalid INI section name that PasteDeploy will reject at runtime.

The existing duplicate-name guard and the analogous empty-`AppName` guard in `RenderPastePipeline` establish a precedent. Adding a matching check here keeps the error contract consistent:

```go
if p.ConfigSection == "" {
    return nil, fmt.Errorf("plugin %q has an empty ConfigSection", p.Name)
}
```

There is also no test covering this path.

<details><summary>Prompt To Fix With AI</summary>

`````markdown
This is a comment left during a code review.
Path: internal/common/plugins/plugins.go
Line: 107-118

Comment:
**Empty `ConfigSection` produces invalid INI output**

The function guards against duplicate `ConfigSection` names but not against an empty one. If `p.ConfigSection == ""`, the result map gets an entry with key `""`. When passed to `config.RenderINI`, this renders as `[]` — an invalid INI section name that PasteDeploy will reject at runtime.

The existing duplicate-name guard and the analogous empty-`AppName` guard in `RenderPastePipeline` establish a precedent. Adding a matching check here keeps the error contract consistent:

```go
if p.ConfigSection == "" {
    return nil, fmt.Errorf("plugin %q has an empty ConfigSection", p.Name)
}
```

There is also no test covering this path.

How can I resolve this? If you propose a fix, please make it concise.
`````
</details>
code_comments.author: greptile-apps[bot]
code_comments.resolution: Added an early guard `if p.ConfigSection == "" { return nil, fmt.Errorf(...) }` at the top of the plugin iteration loop in `RenderPluginConfig`, placed before the existing duplicate-name check. A new test `TestRenderPluginConfig_emptyConfigSectionReturnsError` covers this path, addressing the reviewer's note about missing test coverage.

resolution_summary: Added early validation guards for empty `Name` in `MiddlewareSpec` and empty `ConfigSection` in `PluginSpec` within `internal/common/plugins/plugins.go`, returning descriptive errors before invalid data can produce malformed PasteDeploy output. Corresponding test cases were added in `plugins_test.go` to cover both new error paths.
